summary: The diff implements REQ-9 by seeding 12 sample menu items across 4 categories (Starters, Mains, Desserts, Drinks) in backend/main.mo. Each item has a non-empty name, description, price > 0, a valid category string, and availability set to true. A migration module (backend/migration.mo) is also added to handle the seeding on upgrade. The implementation satisfies all stated acceptance criteria for REQ-9.

hallucinated_features.description: A new file backend/migration.mo was added as a separate module
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request constraint explicitly states 'Seeding must occur inside the existing single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo — no new files or actors.' Adding backend/migration.mo violates this constraint.
